mapper.select:
select inv.id, inv.material_id, m.code as materialCode, m.name as materialName, m.specification, m.unit, inv.warehouse_id, w.name as warehouseName, inv.current_number, m.safety_number, m.upper_number, case when m.safety_number is not null and inv.current_number < m.safety_number then 'LOW' when m.upper_number is not null and inv.current_number > m.upper_number then 'OVER' else 'NORMAL' end as stockStatus, inv.last_inbound_time, inv.remark, inv.create_time, inv.update_time from inventory inv left join material m on inv.material_id = m.id and m.deleted = 0 left join warehouse w on inv.warehouse_id = w.id and w.deleted = 0
inv.deleted = 0
and m.code like concat('%', #{q.materialCode}, '%')
and m.name like concat('%', #{q.materialName}, '%')
and w.name like concat('%', #{q.warehouseName}, '%')
and m.safety_number is not null and inv.current_number < m.safety_number
and m.upper_number is not null and inv.current_number > m.upper_number
and ( (m.safety_number is null or inv.current_number >= m.safety_number) and (m.upper_number is null or inv.current_number <= m.upper_number) )
order by inv.update_time desc, inv.id desc

select id, material_id, warehouse_id, current_number, last_inbound_time, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted from inventory where material_id = #{materialId} and warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and deleted = 0 for update
select id, material_id, warehouse_id, current_number, last_inbound_time, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted from inventory where id = #{id} and deleted = 0 for update
mapper.update: update inventory set current_number = current_number + #{changeNumber}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
